name: Suite 1 — Foundations (SELECT / FILTER / ORDER / LIMIT)
description: Foundational SQL shapes. Pure selection + filtering + ordering + top-N. No joins, no aggregations, no window functions. Every analyst question starts here. ExpectedSql is the canonical form against which multiset-equal results are accepted.

Scenarios.Question: list ticket numbers
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber FROM Tickets t WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: show me all user emails
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Email FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: list entity names
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM Entitys WHERE IsActive = 1

Scenarios.Question: show me user names and emails
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT UserName, Email FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: show ticket number title and created date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: give me each entity name and whether it is active
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name, IsActive FROM Entitys

Scenarios.Question: tickets with critical priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: open tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets that are open and critical
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: active users created this year
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT UserName, Email FROM AspNetUsers WHERE IsActive = 1 AND YEAR(CreatedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE())

Scenarios.Question: tickets that are open or in progress
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name IN ('Open','In Progress') AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets with critical or high priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name IN ('Critical','High') AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets with title containing login
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE Title LIKE '%login%' AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets without a category
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE CategoryId IS NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets that have been resolved
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title, ResolvedAt FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets ordered by creation date oldest first
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY CreatedAt ASC

Scenarios.Question: tickets ordered by creation date newest first
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: tickets ordered by priority then by created date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, p.Name AS Priority, t.CreatedAt FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY p.Name, t.CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: first 5 tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY CreatedAt ASC

Scenarios.Question: latest 10 tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC
